concept: Create a game where I control a character who can temporarily transfer their consciousness into photographs, entering the scenes depicted within them. While inside a photo, I can manipulate objects within the frame's boundaries and potentially create changes that affect the real world when I return. The game's mysteries are solved by finding connections between seemingly unrelated photographs scattered throughout an abandoned photography studio. The protagonist gradually discovers they are actually a subject in one of the most important photographs, which explains their unique ability and forgotten past.
